title: Test Display for Percentage
scenario: Formatting is public behavior. A small table keeps display expectations obvious.
instructions: Implement Display for Percentage and add table-driven display tests.

hints.body: Keep the Table-driven domain tests code active and implement Display for Percentage and add table-driven display tests.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Test Display for Percentage is shown below.

completionExplanation: Test Display for Percentage now extends the active Table-driven domain tests code with percentage display tests. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
